name: lunch-roulette
description: Daily lunch roulette for remote teams: invites people in a Slack channel, learns who's free today and when, pairs them into twos (or a three when odd) while rotating day to day, and sends Google Calendar invites with a Google Meet. A trusted orchestrator skill does the matching, timezone math (UTC), and calendar/Drive writes; a tool-locked lunch-messenger subagent (Sonnet) handles all Slack conversation with coworkers.
